Name: AXI_SP32B1024.axi_awaddr
Description: Carries the AXI write address; its low 10 bits are captured on the falling edge to drive the memory address bus A for write accesses.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.axi_araddr
Description: Carries the AXI read address; its low 10 bits are captured on the falling edge to drive the memory address bus A for read accesses.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.axi_wdata
Description: Provides the data for write transactions; captured into DP and used to form the memory data bus D according to byte strobes.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.CEN
Description: Active-low enable gate for the memory, asserted during read or write activity; derived from read/write state flags.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.WEN
Description: Active-low write enable for the memory, asserted during the write data phase.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.axi_wvalid
Description: Indicates from the master that write data is present; initiates the write data phase.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.axi_rvalid
Description: From the slave, indicates read data is available; driven by reading2.

Name: AXI_SP32B1024.axi_rdata
Description: Read data returned to the AXI master; directly driven from Q (memory output).
